# Define normalization utilities for Arabic
import re

arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r"[\u0617-\u061A\u064B-\u0652\u0657-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]")
tatweel_re = re.compile(r"[\u0640]")
punct_re = re.compile(r"[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]")  # remove punctuation but keep Arabic letters and numbers
space_re = re.compile(r"\s+")

def normalize_arabic(s):
    if s is None:
        return ""
    s = str(s)
    # Remove diacritics
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub("", s)
    # Remove tatweel
    s = tatweel_re.sub("", s)
    # Unify alef variants
    s = s.replace("أ", "ا").replace("إ", "ا").replace("آ", "ا").replace("ٱ", "ا")
    # Unify yaa/alif maqsura
    s = s.replace("ى", "ي")
    # Unify taa marbuta to haa? avoid maybe keep? we can unify to h for matching; but let's map to ه
    s = s.replace("ة", "ه")
    # Unify hamza over/under/standalone to bare hamza? We'll remove hamza char for normalization
    s = s.replace("ؤ", "و").replace("ئ", "ي").replace("ء", "")
    # Lowercase doesn't affect Arabic
    # Remove punctuation
    s = punct_re.sub(" ", s)
    # Collapse spaces
    s = space_re.sub(" ", s).strip()
    return s

def normalize_light(s):
    # lighter normalization: remove diacritics, tatweel, collapse spaces
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub("", s)
    s = tatweel_re.sub("", s)
    s = space_re.sub(" ", s).strip()
    return s

def token_set(s):
    return set(normalize_arabic(s).split())

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # LCS on characters of normalized string (light)
    a = normalize_light(a)
    b = normalize_light(b)
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    # Optimize memory with two rows
    prev = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        cur = [0]*(m+1)
        ai = a[i-1]
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            if ai == b[j-1]:
                cur[j] = prev[j-1] + 1
            else:
                cur[j] = max(prev[j], cur[j-1])
        prev = cur
    return prev[m]

def similarity(a, b):
    # Combine token F1 and LCS ratio
    na = normalize_arabic(a)
    nb = normalize_arabic(b)
    tokens_a = na.split()
    tokens_b = nb.split()
    set_a = set(tokens_a)
    set_b = set(tokens_b)
    inter = set_a & set_b
    precision = len(inter)/len(set_a) if set_a else 0
    recall = len(inter)/len(set_b) if set_b else 0
    f1 = 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall) if (precision+recall)>0 else 0
    lcs = lcs_length(a, b)
    lcs_ratio = lcs / max(len(normalize_light(a)), 1)
    # Weighted score
    score = 0.6*f1 + 0.4*lcs_ratio
    return score, {"f1": f1, "lcs_ratio": lcs_ratio, "na": na, "nb": nb}

target_full = "لا يؤمن أحدكم حتى يكون هواه تبعًا لما جئت به"
norm_target = normalize_arabic(target_full)
norm_target, len(hadith_data)

len(partial_matches)

# Token-based candidate search
target_tokens = token_set(target_full)
target_tokens, len(target_tokens)

# Find hadiths that contain at least 4 of the tokens
candidates = []
for i, h in enumerate(hadith_data):
    for field in ('hadithTxt', 'Matn'):
        txt = h.get(field)
